/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libDebugUtils-d.a CMakeFiles/DebugUtils.dir/Source/DebugDraw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DebugUtils.dir/Source/DetourDebugDraw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DebugUtils.dir/Source/RecastDebugDraw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DebugUtils.dir/Source/RecastDump.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libDebugUtils-d.a
